:::: columns
::: {.column width="65%"}
# Sergio Páez Moncaleano

Assistant Professor of Statistics\
Universidad Nacional de Colombia

My work focuses on:

-   Biostatistics
-   Statistical inference
-   Generalized Linear Models
-   Statistical computing in R
-   Probability theory

I am interested in statistical education, computational methods, and modern data analysis.

## Current Interests

-   Statistical learning
-   Biostatistics
:::
::::

## Contact

spaezm\@unal.edu.co

## Links

-   <i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i> spaezm\@unal.edu.co
-   <i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i> <https://github.com/spaezm>
-   <i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i> [Google scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=kyRvLMcAAAAJ&hl=en)
